## Third party libraries used by FreeDV

This folder contains copies of the following third party libraries:

1. [r8brain](https://github.com/avaneev/r8brain-free-src) by Aleksey Vaneev (Voxengo) - commit [5c44beb](https://github.com/avaneev/r8brain-free-src/commit/5c44bebe9c477d47b1dc7037fcaae2794ff2b4e1) plus updates by FreeDV to support newer [pffft](https://github.com/marton78/pffft).
2. [WebRTC_AGC](https://github.com/cpuimage/WebRTC_AGC) - commit [08783a9](https://github.com/cpuimage/WebRTC_AGC/commit/08783a972fd96c0a06021bc8741643392bbf2919).
3. [websocketpp](https://github.com/zaphoyd/websocketpp) - commit [4dfe1be](https://github.com/zaphoyd/websocketpp/commit/4dfe1be74e684acca19ac1cf96cce0df9eac2a2d).
4. [yyjson](https://github.com/ibireme/yyjson) - version 0.12.0.

Thanks to all of the above projects for enabling certain FreeDV functionality!
